title: Teams chat (Operations) — 2026-02 job schedule
body:
Channel: Operations

[2026-02-21 00:00] Nadia Carr: Posting the February 2026 schedule: job_000712 at Arrowhead Commons for the maintenance plan, amount $739.95; job_000710 at Sandstone Commons for the maintenance plan, amount $739.95.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Anthony Ellis: Also on the board: job_000717 for Greg Jennings, install, $687.96; and job_000708 at Cobblestone Properties, install, $229.32.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Nadia Carr: The remaining installs and repair are job_000716 at Cole Family Hospitality, install, $687.96, and job_000705 for Erin Quinn, repair, $305.26.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Anthony Ellis: Jared Hale is listed with Operations for the schedule, and the leadership contacts are Nadia Carr and Anthony Ellis.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Nadia Carr: Please keep the job IDs with the customer and service details when working through the February 2026 list.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Anthony Ellis: Confirmed: Arrowhead Commons and Sandstone Commons are maintenance plan jobs at $739.95 each.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Nadia Carr: Confirmed: Greg Jennings and Cobblestone Properties are install jobs, at $687.96 and $229.32 respectively; Cole Family Hospitality is an install at $687.96.
[2026-02-21 00:00] Anthony Ellis: And Erin Quinn is the repair job at $305.26. That covers the February 2026 Operations schedule.
